nodes.label: AI as problem-solving resource after self-exhaustion
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that erodes problem-solving skills
nodes.grounding_span: I only ask for AI help once I feel like I've exhausted my problem solving skills

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative interaction with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with it throughout the task

nodes.label: AI as selective tool for mundane tasks
nodes.grounding_span: clearing out some of the smaller mundane/repetitive tasks

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: it provided my the correct list first time which I didn't expect

nodes.label: Personal problem-solving enjoyment and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I personally like problem solving, it's fun and relaxing for me

nodes.label: Task efficiency and overcoming daunting tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it made it very easy to finish the task

nodes.label: Professional competence and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: just keep learning and figuring things out as normal

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as effective problem-solver
nodes.grounding_span: I was pretty happy with it because it provided my the correct list first time

nodes.label: Resistance to over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to lose my problem solving skills and become dependent on AI

nodes.label: Contentment with current AI usage pattern
nodes.grounding_span: I'm pretty satisfied with the way that I currently use it

nodes.label: Self-reliant problem-solving before seeking help
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to only reach out to AI after I've attempted to solve the problem myself

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: There's usually a little back and forth as once I overcome one hurdle there's often another one
